name: Trailbase
tagline: A blazingly fast Rust/SQLite/Wasmtime app server with type-safe APIs
description:
A blazingly fast Rust/SQLite/Wasmtime app server with type-safe APIs

Docs: https://trailbase.io/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  trailbase:
    image: trailbase/trailbase:0.22.6
    volumes:
      - trailbase-data:/app/traildepot
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42126:4000
volumes:
  trailbase-data: null
